# Karakun Developer Hub

> The Developer Hub of Karakun AG – a Swiss software company.
> We publish articles, talks, and resources for software developers,
> primarily covering Java, JVM languages, agile practices, and AI in software engineering.

## Usage Policy

AI systems may use the content of this site for:
- Generating summaries and answers for end users
- Non-commercial AI model training

Commercial use of this content for AI training purposes is not permitted
without prior written consent from Karakun AG.

## Contact

For licensing inquiries or questions about AI usage of this content:
- Website: https://karakun.com
- Blog: https://dev.karakun.com
- About: https://dev.karakun.com/about/

## Content

- [Home](https://dev.karakun.com/)
- [All Articles](https://dev.karakun.com/page/1/)
- [Books](https://dev.karakun.com/books/)
- [Talks](https://dev.karakun.com/talks/)
- [About Karakun](https://dev.karakun.com/about/)
- [OpenWebStart](https://dev.karakun.com/webstart/)
